response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including geospatial projects (GISCollective), but his primary expertise lies in Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang rather than modern C++/Rust required for the role. His geospatial work is notable but lacks evidence of handling large-scale routing data pipelines or distributed systems at the level needed for this senior role.
strengths: Strong geospatial project experience (GISCollective) with event-driven architecture and Kubernetes deployment
Proven ability to build and maintain high-performance systems (low-latency apps, millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Demonstrated adaptability across stacks (C++, Dlang, Rust alternatives, Node.js, TypeScript)
concerns: Limited direct experience with modern C++ or Rust (core requirement for this role)
No clear evidence of working with routing data pipelines or navigation guidance solutions
Geospatial work focuses more on data collection than optimization/processing latency reduction
